attacking_style: Attacks from breakaways on climbs, showing willingness to go solo from companion groups. Targets early-to-mid race climbs rather than waiting for finale.
team_tactics: Trek-Segafredo provides momentum and support for early breakaway insertion. Limited evidence of specific lead-out or tempo control from teammates in observed races.
terrain_preference: Climbs within breakaway contexts suit him best (Mont Brouilly attack). Struggles to survive when pace intensifies in race finales with elite climbers.
vulnerability: Cannot maintain position when race intensifies late or when strong pursuers (like Asgreen) organize chase efforts. Lacks the durability to contest from breakaways when caught.
key_patterns: Attacks from within breakaways on climbs, not from peloton (2 instances)
Active in early-to-mid race phases rather than finale positioning (2 instances)
Gets neutralized when stronger riders or organized teams chase down moves (2 instances)
form_trajectory: neutral: Showed aggression across both races but mixed results—successful attack at Paris-Nice, neutralized at Dauphiné. No clear progression.
